title: DONATION CALL OUT - 211info
text: DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON DONATION CALL OUT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of business casual, casual, and trade clothing, scrubs, coats, shoes, purses, backpacks, new undergarments, makeup, toiletries, and jewelry. 1532 NE 37th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations are accepted on monthly donation days Email (503) 249-7300 107 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 249-7300 Main phone Main phone (503) 249-7300 ext 107 Deona Waters [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for Donation Call Out Day, items accepted and in need. 25 items per donor. Accepts items that are clean, and neatly folded in bags, boxes, or on hangers. Does not accept items in trash bags. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Yamhill, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Hollywood District, between NE Broadway and NE Sandy Streets. Parking is free at the Banfield Motel. Close to the Hollywood / NE 42nd Avenue MAX Transit Station and TriMet bus lines 12, 75, and 77. Services: Clothing Donation Programs * Women Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB SEARCH ESSENTIALS MATERIAL GOODS - DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON
